title: Toy/Game Donation Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Toy/Game Donation Programs 12 Matching Service Providers FRIENDS OF LINCOLN COUNTY ANIMALS PICK OF THE LITTER THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Thrift store whose proceeds benefit domesticated animals in Lincoln County, both those housed at the Lincoln County Animal Shelter and those living in community households. Accepts donations of clean and working small kitchen appliances, bedding or linen, toys/games, books clothing, kitchenware and other small household items. 558 NE 1st Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Friday-Saturday 10am-4pm Donations: Thursday-Saturday 10am-3:30pm Email (541) 574-1861 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HUMANE SOCIETY OF CENTRAL OREGON HUMANE SOCIETY OF CENTRAL OREGON THRIFT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a thrift store that sells donated items, including clothing, furniture, household items, sporting goods, and other items. Net proceeds benefit the animals at the Humane Society of Central Oregon. 61220 S Highway 97 Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: 7 days per week 10am-6pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 10am-4pm Email (541) 388-3448 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MY FATHER'S HOUSE MY FATHER'S HOUSE DONATION CENTER DONATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of food, cleaning supplies, paper products, diapers, office supplies, wrapping paper, bus tickets, grocery gift cards, and new toys. 5003 W Powell Boulevard Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Saturday 9am-1pm (503) 492-3046 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEXT DOOR CLOTHING AND TOYS CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers children's clothing, toys and supplies. 965 Tucker Road Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Open to any families that would like to either donate or take gently used baby clothing, toys, and baby equipment. Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 10 am-12pm and 1-3pm Email (541) 386-6665 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEXT DOOR NEXT DOOR WASCO CLOTHING AND TOYS CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers children's clothing, toys and supplies. 1113 Kelly Avenue The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Open to any families that would like to either donate or take gently used baby clothing, toys, and baby equipment. Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 10 am-12pm and 1-3pm Email (541) 296-8118 Get Directions Visit Website More Details REACHING OUR COMMUNITY ROC RESALE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a thrift store with used clothing and toys. Accepts donations of gently used clothing and toys. Clothing vouchers are available. 564 SW Foundry Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Thrift Store: Unrestricted Clothing Vouchers: Women and children Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 9am-4pm Email (541) 476-3344 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY THRIFT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a thrift store that sells household goods, books, furniture, toys, clothing, shoes, jewelry, electronics, and various accessories to raise money to benefit animal welfare programs. Donations accepted. 1169 Redwood Avenue Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Friday 9am-4pm, Saturday 9am-2pm Email (541) 955-3367 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SHARING HANDS THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a thrift store that sells new and used appliances, clothes, electronics, and miscellaneous household goods. Accepts donations in good working condition. 107 W Bishop Way Brownsville, OR 97327 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-4pm Email (541) 466-3003 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SISTERS HABITAT FOR HUMANITY SISTERS HABITAT FOR HUMANITY THRIFT STORE SISTERS HABITAT THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gently used low cost goods for families in the area that have been donated. Proceeds go toward Habitat for Humanity's affordable homeownership program. Donations and volunteers welcome. 211 E Cascade Avenue Sisters, OR 97759 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Monday-Saturday 10am-5pm Donations accepted: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-1pm Email (541) 549-1740 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SNOWCAP COMMUNITY CHARITIES SNOWCAP COMMUNITY CHARITIES DONATIONS DONATIONS AND VOLUNTEERING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of vehicles, commercially packaged food (canned, boxed, fresh, frozen, or dried), baby food/formula, pet food, clothing, socks, shoes, blankets, bedding, pillows, towels, washcloths, personal care/hygiene products, new toys, books, school supplies, and diapers (infant, toddler, or adult). Offers volunteer opportunities for a variety of roles. 17788 SE Pine Street Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (503) 674-8785 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST MARK'S LUTHERAN CHURCH BETHLEHEM CHILDREN’S CLOTHES CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides children’s clothing (sizes preemie through teens), maternity clothing, baby supplies (diapers, wipes, pull-ups, formula, and car seats), and toys, while supplies last. Also accepts donations 5415 SE Powell Boulevard Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Ages 0-17 for clothing; expectant parents Hours: Clothing: By appointment only Donations: Tuesday-Friday 10am-3pm Email (503) 777-1443 Get Directions Visit Website More Details VINA MOSES CENTER VINA'S FREE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing and shoes including interview-ready clothes, food, home goods, kitchenware (pots, pans, dish sets), and hygiene items. Workforce closet available with work boots and shoes, rain and safety gear. Shopping allowed once per month. Exceptions made for special circumstances. Accepts donations of food, clothing, bedding, linens, kitchenware, toys and games, and hygiene supplies. 968 NW Garfield Avenue Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: -Thrift Store: Monday/Wednesday 1pm-3pm, Tuesday/Thursday 10am-noon and 1pm-3pm, 1st Saturday of the month noon-3pm -Donations: Visit website for current hours Email (541) 753-1420 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FRIENDS OF LINCOLN COUNTY ANIMALS PICK OF THE LITTER THRIFT STORE HUMANE SOCIETY OF CENTRAL OREGON THRIFT STORE MY FATHER'S HOUSE DONATION CENTER NEXT DOOR CLOTHING AND TOYS CLOSET NEXT DOOR CLOTHING AND TOYS CLOSET REACHING OUR COMMUNITY ROC RESALE ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY THRIFT STORE SHARING HANDS THRIFT STORE SISTERS HABITAT FOR HUMANITY SISTERS HABITAT THRIFT STORE SNOWCAP COMMUNITY CHARITIES DONATIONS AND VOLUNTEERING ST MARK'S LUTHERAN CHURCH BETHLEHEM CHILDREN’S CLOTHES CLOSET VINA MOSES CENTER VINA'S FREE THRIFT STORE
